chatSummary.title: Chat Summary
chatSummary.description: Faithful transcript/summary of the return follow-up so the closed Case carries the interaction.

confirmed.title: Confirmed by Shopper
confirmed.description: True only for a new return after explicit confirmation. For an existing Return Pending follow-up, pass false.

itemsToReturn.title: Items to Return
itemsToReturn.description: Items the shopper wants to return, or all.

orderIdentifier.title: Order Identifier
orderIdentifier.description: Order number or Woo id. Leave blank for the most recent order.

reason.title: Return Reason
reason.description: Damaged, Wrong Item, Not As Described, Changed Mind, Quality, or Other.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass loggedInEmail when signed in, or the opaque OTP proof after email-code verification.
